ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set here your own OpenAI api key
ast.target: 在此处设置您自己的 OpenAI API 密钥

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please wait while the docker is being loaded, the first time could take several minutes...
ast.target: 请稍候，Docker 正在加载中，首次加载可能需要几分钟...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please wait while the docker is ingesting the docs of your vault, the fisrt time could take several minutes...
ast.target: 请稍候，Docker 正在摄取您知识库的文档，首次摄取可能需要几分钟...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: brAIn is not running, check that you have run the ingest command first and also that no other services are using port 9000
ast.target: brAIn 未运行，请检查您是否已先运行摄取命令，并确保没有其他服务占用端口 9000。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenAI api key not set. You need to add an OpenAI api key brAIn settings.
ast.target: 未设置 OpenAI API 密钥。您需要在 brAIn 设置中添加一个 OpenAI API 密钥。
